generated_oml:
instance LabScaleGantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system inspired by harbor cranes in the port of Antwerp, used to move small pucks (representing containers) between locations composed of physical hardware and a digital twin with CAD models, kinematic models, and services."
    base:contains 
        CartStepperMotor, 
        HoistStepperMotor, 
        Electromagnet, 
        TMC4671EvalMotorController, 
        SwingAngleEncoder, 
        WindSpeedAnemometer, 
        ArduinoMicrocontroller, 
        Controller, 
        CentralizedDigitalTwinSystem
]

instance CentralizedDigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Single centralized digital twin system comprising multiple interconnected services within a single containerized architecture"
]

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleData
]

instance WindSpeedAnemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedData
]

instance Controller : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Controller generating control commands for the crane"
]

instance ControlCommandData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Control commands for the crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Controller
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Swing angle measurement data"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Wind speed measurement data"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WindSpeedAnemometer
]

instance TimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data stored in TimescaleDB for historical analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleData, WindSpeedData, ControlCommandData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD models for the gantry crane system created with Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CraneDynamicsSimulationService
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGenerationService
]

instance CraneDynamicsSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model of crane dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CraneDynamicsSimulationService
]

instance DarTwinNotation : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DarTwin notation for tracking system evolution"
]

instance CapellaModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Capella models used in teaching for Model-Based Systems Engineering"
]

instance DockerContainerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker for containerization"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, CraneDynamicsSimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, DataVisualizationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB (time-series database)"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance GrafanaVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana for visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance EclipseMosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, CraneDynamicsSimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, DataVisualizationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance GantrylibPythonModule : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based gantrylib module for crane control and data handling"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, CraneDynamicsSimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, DataVisualizationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance ArduinoMicrocontroller : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Arduino microcontroller for sensor interface"
    DTDFVocab:enables SwingAngleEncoder, WindSpeedAnemometer
]

instance AutodeskFusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion360 for CAD modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables CADModel
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation using kinematic models"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryOptimizationInsight
]

instance CraneDynamicsSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of crane dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:provides RunCraneDynamicsSimulationAction
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation comparing real-time measurements with simulations"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationBreachNotification
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data visualization via Grafana dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides ShowDashboardAction
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides LogHistoricalDataAction
]

instance ValidationBreachNotification : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard notifications for validation breaches enabling operator decisions"
]

instance TrajectoryOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Trajectory optimization insights for improved crane movement"
]

instance ShowDashboardAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Display dashboard for monitoring crane status"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LogHistoricalDataAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Log historical data to TimescaleDB for future analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RunCraneDynamicsSimulationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Run simulation of crane dynamics for validation and optimization"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cart stepper motor for horizontal movement"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Hoist stepper motor for vertical movement"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for picking up containers"
]

instance TMC4671EvalMotorController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controllers for controlling cart and hoist stepper motors"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for crane movement (cart and hoist) generated by Trajectory Generator Service and Control Application transmitted via Python Crane Interface to TMC4671-Eval motor controllers."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization with no specified time intervals; validation and logging occur continuously."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized constellation with physical crane components, Python-based control and logging applications, containerized database (TimescaleDB), dashboard (Grafana), and services (trajectory generation, simulation, validation) interconnected via MQTT broker; all deployed on a single personal computer."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers as-operated phase for continuous validation and control; CAD models represent the designed phase, but the primary use is during operation for monitoring and optimization."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation using distance metrics between real-time measurements and simulations; threshold-based validation to detect discrepancies; model validation techniques applied to ensure accuracy of simulation against physical system behavior."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto) for inter-service communication; direct database writes to TimescaleDB for logging; no specific hardware communication protocols detailed beyond Arduino control."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All services deployed on a single personal computer; containerized using Docker (TimescaleDB, MQTT, Grafana); Python gantrylib module installed via pip for control and logging applications."
]
